you_can_import_a_csv: You can import a reading log CSV file to My Bible Log.

messaging.file_not_a_csv: File {filename} is not in CSV format. It is {filetype}.
messaging.unable_to_parse_file: Unable to parse file {filename}. Make sure the format is correct.
messaging.unable_to_parse_any_log_entries: Unable to parse any log entries from uploaded files.
messaging.there_was_a_problem_creating_the_log_ent: There was a problem creating the log entries.

look_back_date_reset_message.1: Your imported file includes log entries before your Look Back Date. Most pages will ignore these entries when showing your progress.
look_back_date_reset_message.2: Would you like to update your Look Back Date to {lookBackDate} to include these entries?
